test.failureSummary: Workspace test run failed in apps/trading with 277 failures due unresolved import '@universe/gating' in src/setupTests.ts.

typecheck.failureSummary: Workspace typecheck failed in web due React type incompatibilities in swap token selector and wallet provider components.

supplementalValidation.observation: Non-regression test subset passed: api 159 tests, sdk 33 tests, scripts 7 tests.
apps/trading typecheck failed with existing upstream dependency/type graph issues (TS6305 and missing module declarations).
Filtered lint completed successfully for selected packages.
Build attempt failed in web at Next.js typecheck step with same React type incompatibility.

blockingIssues.description: Cannot proceed to scrutiny feature reviews because required workspace validators are failing before review stage.
apps/trading tests fail due unresolved '@universe/gating' import, causing 277 suite failures.
web package fails typecheck/build from React type mismatch in token selector and wallet provider, blocking full workspace validation.
